ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bug */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., UNCONFIRMED, NEW, RESOLVED) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., normal, high, critical) */,
  "bug_number" TEXT /* Bug number (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bug was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bug was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the bug is associated with */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Indicates how often the bug can be reproduced */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the bug was found (e.g., development, testing, production) */,
  "steps_to_reproduce" TEXT /* Detailed steps to reproduce the bug */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the bug was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the bug */,
  "reopened_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the bug has been reopened */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated time to resolve the bug */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual time spent on resolving the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client or department the project is for */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the project completed */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment addresses the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES bug_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, text, video) */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the attachment contains sensitive information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_attachments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the history entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status, severity, assignee) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value after the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the bug is assigned to */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the assignment */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the bug */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug that is dependent */,
  "dependent_bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug it depends on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., blocks, related) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_dependencies_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_dependencies_dependent_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_tags_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., found in, fixed in) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_versions_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the priority is associated with */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "priority_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assigned priority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the priority was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the priority was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_priorities_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)
